subcodes.first_line: O divine friends and true companions of the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name! From the horizon of the world He doth shine forth with resplendent rays [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی و یاران حقیقی جمال قدم و اسم اعظم از افق عالم بانوار ساطع بر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @power of love, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
